documentation.file_docstring: OpenCode Zen model catalog with dynamic fetching, caching, and static fallback. OpenCode Zen is a pay-as-you-go token-based API that provides access to curated models optimized for coding agents. It uses per-request billing with auto top-up. Note: OpenCode Black ($20/$100/$200/month subscriptions) is a separate product with flat-rate usage tiers. This module handles Zen, not Black. API endpoint: https://opencode.ai/zen/v1 Auth URL: https://opencode.ai/auth
inline_comments: Cache for fetched models (1 hour TTL)
Model aliases for convenient shortcuts. Users can use "opus" instead of "claude-opus-4-6", etc.
Claude
Legacy Claude aliases (OpenCode Zen rotates model catalogs; keep old keys working).
GPT-5.x family
Legacy GPT aliases (keep old config/docs stable; map to closest current equivalents).
Legacy O-series aliases (no longer in the Zen catalog; map to a strong default).
Codex family
Gemini
Legacy Gemini 2.5 aliases (map to the nearest current Gemini tier).
GLM (free)
Resolve a model alias to its full model ID. Returns the input if no alias exists.
OpenCode Zen routes models to specific API shapes by family.
Check if a model supports image input.
Build a ModelDefinitionConfig from a model ID.
Treat Zen models as reasoning-capable so defaults pick thinkLevel="low" unless users opt out.
Format a model ID into a human-readable name.
Static fallback models when API is unreachable.
Response shape from OpenCode Zen /models endpoint. Returns OpenAI-compatible format.
Fetch models from the OpenCode Zen API. Uses caching with 1-hour TTL. @param apiKey - OpenCode Zen API key for authentication @returns Array of model definitions, or static fallback on failure
Return cached models if still valid
Clear the model cache (useful for testing or forcing refresh).
